options.name: --quick
options.description: Lint skips checks that would require to download and build the spec

options.name: --allow-warnings
options.description: Lint validates even if warnings are present

options.name: --subspec
options.description: Lint validates only the given subspec

options.name: --no-subspecs
options.description: Lint skips validation of subspecs

options.name: --no-clean
options.description: Lint leaves the build directory intact for inspection

options.name: --fail-fast
options.description: Lint stops on the first failing platform or subspec

options.name: --use-libraries
options.description: Lint uses static libraries to install the spec

options.name: --use-modular-headers
options.description: Lint uses modular headers during installation

options.name: --use-static-frameworks
options.description: Lint uses static frameworks during installation

options.name: --sources
options.description: The sources from which to pull dependent pods (defaults to https://cdn.cocoapods.org/). Multiple sources must be comma-delimited

options.name: --platforms
options.description: Lint against specific platforms (defaults to all platforms supported by the podspec). Multiple platforms must be comma-delimited

options.name: --private
options.description: Lint skips checks that apply only to public specs

options.name: --swift-version
options.description: The `SWIFT_VERSION` that should be used to lint the spec. This takes precedence over the Swift versions specified by the spec or a `.swift-version` file

options.name: --skip-import-validation
options.description: Lint skips validating that the pod can be imported

options.name: --skip-tests
options.description: Lint skips building and running tests during validation

options.description: List of test specs to run

options.description: Validate with the Xcode Static Analysis tool

options.description: Build using the given configuration (defaults to Release)

options.description: Allows CocoaPods to run as root
